0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-76", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Equivalent Special Elements"}], "description": "BerriAI/litellm is vulnerable to Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) via the `/completions` endpoint. The vulnerability arises from the `hf_chat_template` method processing the `chat_template` parameter from the `tokenizer_config.json` file through the Jinja template engine without proper sanitization. Attackers can exploit this by crafting malicious `tokenizer_config.json` files that execute arbitrary code on the server.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01256, "percentile": 0.65677}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-46cm-pfwv-cgf8", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-04-10T22:18:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-46cm-pfwv-cgf8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-46cm-pfwv-cgf8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-2952"}], "nvd_published_at": "2024-04-10T17:15:54Z", "published_at": "2024-04-10T18:30:48Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-2952", "https://huntr.com/bounties/a9e0a164-6de0-43a4-a640-0cbfb54220a4", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/blob/0d803e13798db40aa7463e64a6bafaee386424f5/litellm/proxy/proxy_server.py#L2087", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/2949", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/2941", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/commit/8a1cdc901708b07b7ff4eca20f9cb0f1f0e8d0b3", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-46cm-pfwv-cgf8", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/litellm/PYSEC-2026-387.yaml", "https://pypi.org/project/litellm"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "summary": "LiteLLM has Server-Side Template Injection vulnerability in /completions endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T14:50:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-46cm-pfwv-cgf8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.34.42", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "litellm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.34.42"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
